rounds.reason: TensorFlow tf.batch_to_space requires 'block_shape' (1-D tensor/list, not scalar 'block_size') and 'crops' as tensor; MindSpore BatchToSpace requires scalar 'block_size' (>=2) and 'crops' as Python list/tuple of shape [[h1,h2],[w1,w2]], not tensor. Both APIs reject current args due to param name/type mismatch.

MindSpore clip_by_norm does not accept 'clip_norm' parameter; it uses 'max_norm' instead, and requires actual Tensor input (not just shape/dtype spec), per its doc. TensorFlow uses 'clip_norm'. Also, MindSpore requires float input and does not support int dtype for this op.
